vars.MERCHANT_DESCRIPTION: Product catalog powered by Commerce llms.txt
vars.SHIPPING_POLICY: Orders are typically processed within 1–3 business days. Once shipped, delivery times vary based on the shipping method selected and destination.  Customers will receive a tracking number when available. We are not responsible for delays caused by carriers, weather, or other circumstances beyond our control.  Please ensure your shipping address is accurate at checkout. We are not responsible for orders shipped to incorrectly provided addresses.
vars.RETURN_POLICY: All sales are final. Returns, exchanges, and refunds are not accepted unless an item arrives damaged or incorrect.  If you receive a damaged or incorrect item, please contact us within 7 days of delivery with your order number and photos of the item.  For questions, please contact us
